production_discount.note: Production fee reduced by $125 if renewal contract comes with testimonial letter at submission

payment_options.paid_in_full: Full payment with contract. 5% discount allowed on package + production.
payment_options.installments_6mo: 6 months with consecutive equal payments from date of sale
payment_options.installments_12mo: 12 months with consecutive equal payments from date of sale
payment_options.note: Consecutive means consecutive, equal auto-deducted payments dated 30 days apart

ach_bonus.condition: ACH payment deposit with 4 pays or less

commission_definitions.UF: Up Front - commission advanced all at once
commission_definitions.AE: As Earned - commission paid each time customer pays
commission_definitions.PIF: Paid in Full - payment received with contract, paid As Earned without PO/check/charge
commission_definitions.active_print_ad: Customer has a Print Ad running for the full term of the Digital Ad
